name: IDE / Storage Controller Device Classes
categoryDescription: Hardware device connection history — USB storage, Bluetooth, portable devices, and imaging hardware.
description: IDE/SATA storage controller device class GUIDs and physical drive enumeration — records all hard drives and optical drives connected.
forensic_value: Establishes baseline storage topology — useful for detecting added/removed drives. IDE enumeration reveals drive model, firmware, and serial number for connected internal drives.
